title: dryopteris caripensis
intro: Dryopteris caripensis, also known as the Guatemalan wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris caripensis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
